reviews.review_description: Tried the game with a friend and it was great fun! It's still a work in progress, but it has tons of potential and a really fun mechanism!

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying and review!

reviews.review_description:
Thank you a lot for checking out TTP! 
This is our first release, and we want you to keep in mind that this is a prototype and very early access. We will continue to develop and add improvements to the game :)

So if you are a fan of TTP and want to see us continue working on it - make sure to tell us!
